# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project deploys from the latest commit on the main branch.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| main | Yes |
| Older commits/tags | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, do not open a public issue.

Please report it privately by email:

- Email: hraipuru@asu.edu
- Subject: Security Report - Hithesh Portfolio

Please include:

- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested remediation

## Response Targets

- Acknowledgement: within 72 hours
- Initial triage update: within 7 days
- Resolution target: based on severity and deployment risk

## Scope

This policy applies to:

- Website source code in this repository
- GitHub Actions workflows in this repository
- Client-side dependency vulnerabilities affecting production build output
